revision.comment: Created page with "==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am~~~~"
revision.text: ==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)

revision.comment: /* Can't create new articles */ new section
revision.text:
==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was /* Can't create new articles */
revision.text:
==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC) ::Thanks for reviving this wiki. I think it's a good idea for us to make sure that our contributions here stick long-term. I'll also make sure to respect Miraheze's disk storage space. Keep up the good work! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:40, 20 January 2026 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC) ::Thanks for reviving this wiki. I think it's a good idea for us to make sure that our contributions here stick long-term. I'll also make sure to respect Miraheze's disk storage space. Keep up the good work! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:40, 20 January 2026 (UTC)
== Disable hCaptcha ==
Can you disable the hCaptcha requirement for me by upgrading my user level? It's slowing down my edits a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:54, 20 January 2026 (UTC)

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC) ::Thanks for reviving this wiki. I think it's a good idea for us to make sure that our contributions here stick long-term. I'll also make sure to respect Miraheze's disk storage space. Keep up the good work! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:40, 20 January 2026 (UTC)
== Disable hCaptcha ==
Can you disable the hCaptcha requirement for me by upgrading my user level? It's slowing down my edits a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:54, 20 January 2026 (UTC) : I gave you autopatrolled[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 13:59, 20 January 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:14, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:14, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC) ::Thanks for reviving this wiki. I think it's a good idea for us to make sure that our contributions here stick long-term. I'll also make sure to respect Miraheze's disk storage space. Keep up the good work! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:40, 20 January 2026 (UTC)
== Disable hCaptcha ==
Can you disable the hCaptcha requirement for me by upgrading my user level? It's slowing down my edits a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:54, 20 January 2026 (UTC) : I gave you autopatrolled[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 13:59, 20 January 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-27 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:EmmaBot|EmmaBot]] ([[User talk:EmmaBot|talk]]) 05:40, 27 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:EmmaBot|EmmaBot]] ([[User talk:EmmaBot|talk]]) 05:40, 27 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->

==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC) ::Thanks for reviving this wiki. I think it's a good idea for us to make sure that our contributions here stick long-term. I'll also make sure to respect Miraheze's disk storage space. Keep up the good work! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:40, 20 January 2026 (UTC)
== Disable hCaptcha ==
Can you disable the hCaptcha requirement for me by upgrading my user level? It's slowing down my edits a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:54, 20 January 2026 (UTC) : I gave you autopatrolled[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 13:59, 20 January 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> ==Hello== I don't think I will be getting many messages here. But I hate red links so here I am[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:03, 19 December 2024 (UTC) {{ARABICMONTHNAME|4}}
==Thanks for creating this wiki!== Hi Immanuelle, thank you so much for creating this wiki. I really appreciate your work on other wikis too. I hope to help you expand Shinto Wiki! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 18:55, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :Thank you so much. I greatly appreciate being appreciated! I hope you can help a lot. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:57, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::Would you be able to disable spam filters for me? I can't publish more new articles on here. I'm getting this error: "This action has been automatically identified as harmful, and therefore disallowed. If you believe your action was constructive, please inform an administrator of what you were trying to do. A brief description of the abuse rule which your action matched is: Anti-spam 3.0" Thanks a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:09, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::I am not sure how to do it, but I will try to figure it out. I will give you extended confirmed and lets see if that works. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:14, 17 August 2025 (UTC) ::::Thanks, I can now publish new articles. You can check meta.wikimedia.org for [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:CentralAuth/Yenistardom my global contributions] (same user name) if you would like to get an idea of what kinds of contributions I make on other wiki sites. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 19:17, 17 August 2025 (UTC) :::::You seem like a great contributor. Welcome to the wiki![[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:31, 17 August 2025 (UTC)
== Can't create new articles ==
Hi Immanuelle, I can't seem to Can't create new articles here, since they all redirect to the English Wikipedia. Can you fix this issue? [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 16:04, 4 December 2025 (UTC) :Fixing it[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:00, 4 December 2025 (UTC) ::Thanks for reviving this wiki. I think it's a good idea for us to make sure that our contributions here stick long-term. I'll also make sure to respect Miraheze's disk storage space. Keep up the good work! [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:40, 20 January 2026 (UTC)
== Disable hCaptcha ==
Can you disable the hCaptcha requirement for me by upgrading my user level? It's slowing down my edits a lot. [[User:Yenistardom|Yenistardom]] ([[User talk:Yenistardom|talk]]) 10:54, 20 January 2026 (UTC) : I gave you autopatrolled[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 13:59, 20 January 2026 (UTC)
